message:
beads: Reopen 4 valuable orchestration features

Reopened (incorrectly closed as "over-engineering"):
- bd-3kmf: --chain (multi-step workflow automation)
- bd-377a: review-queue (automated code review pipeline)
- bd-29nc: rebalance (fault tolerance for agent failures)
- bd-2vcs: scale (dynamic agent count based on workload)

These are core orchestration features that justify NTM's existence.
The complexity they encapsulate is exactly what users need handled for them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
